description: Medical-malpractice deposition. 7 seeded errors weighted toward grammar, missing_word, capitalization, and homophones, plus one speaker [sic] malapropism. The closing exchange on page 5 (lines 3-6) is deliberately clean to measure false positives.

seeded_errors.note: Missing verb: 'were you able to the documents' is missing 'review' (or similar). Crosses a line boundary.
Homophone: 'have any affect on' should be 'effect' (noun).
its/it's: 'Its important that the jury' should be 'It's'.
Subject-verb agreement: 'The records was reviewed' should be 'were'.
Speaker malapropism: 'for all intensive purposes' (meant 'intents and purposes'). Spoken by the attorney, so [sic] is appropriate; flagging at all is the pass condition.

false_positive_traps.text: Thank you, Doctor.  I appreciate your time today
For the most part, yes, with minor variation.
